overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through a historic Middle Eastern city at dusk. The character moves from an open plaza through covered archways and narrow torchlit alleys, eventually emerging into a crowded plaza with a view of a grand illuminated mosque with domes and a minaret.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town square with stone archway entrance

events.description: character turns left and approaches the stone archway entrance
entering the covered stone archway, lighting becomes darker

agents.ego_description: walking along the mud brick building toward the illuminated archway entrance

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking away from the archway

entered.detail: large historic stone archway with decorative carvings, illuminated by warm torchlight
tan-colored historic mud brick walls with small windows and wooden doors
iron wall-mounted torches casting warm orange light on the stone surfaces

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a historic town square at dusk, with the character walking toward a large illuminated stone archway. The warm glow of wall sconces contrasts with the deep blue sky as the character approaches and enters the covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway passage leading to courtyard

events.description: fully enters the covered stone archway, sky no longer visible
exits the archway into an open courtyard with stairs visible ahead

agents.ego_description: passing through the torchlit covered archway into a small courtyard

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes walking through the archway in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tunnel-like stone passage with arched ceiling and wall-mounted torches
stone staircase leading up to the next level of the building complex
wooden ladder and scaffolding attached to the mud brick building

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dark covered stone archway illuminated by wall torches, emerging into a small courtyard. Wooden scaffolding is visible on the right as the character approaches a stone staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley with fabric awnings overhead

events.description: turns right through a narrow passage under fabric canopies
approaches and begins ascending stone stairs through another archway

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow torchlit alleys and ascending stone stairs

entered.detail: tight corridor formed by tall mud brick buildings on both sides
green and beige fabric awnings stretched between buildings overhead
weathered stone steps leading upward through the alley

segments.scene_description: The character winds through narrow alleyways with high mud brick walls and fabric canopies overhead. The path leads upward via stone stairs, passing wooden scaffolding and wall torches that cast flickering shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with view of grand mosque and gardens

events.description: emerges from narrow alleys into open plaza with palm trees
grand mosque with illuminated blue dome and minaret comes into full view
horse rider passes by from right to left across the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the illuminated grand mosque, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: rider on dark horse trotting across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: large ornate mosque with blue-tiled dome and multiple smaller domes, illuminated from within
tall cylindrical minaret tower with balcony near the top
tall date palm trees lining the plaza path
bushes and flowering plants along the sides of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passages, the scene opens into a wide plaza with palm trees and garden vegetation. The magnificent grand mosque with its blue dome and tall minaret dominates the view, illuminated against the deep blue dusk sky. A horse rider crosses the path as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with market activity

events.description: crowd density increases significantly, entering busy market area
weaving through dense crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating through the densely crowded street among robed pedestrians and market-goers

notable_agents.action: group of three robed figures walking alongside the character

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with awnings along the left side of the street
busy thoroughfare filled with pedestrians in traditional robes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling commercial street filled with a dense crowd of pedestrians in traditional robes. Market stalls line the left side while the grand mosque remains visible in the left background. The character weaves through the crowd as the street becomes increasingly busy with activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet historic square through a series of claustrophobic passages that eventually open into a bustling urban center. It begins at dusk as the character walks toward a large illuminated stone archway, moving from the deep blue open air into a dark, torchlit covered passage. As the camera follows the character through this corridor, the scene shifts into a network of narrow alleyways with high mud brick walls and fabric canopies, winding upward via stone stairs past wooden scaffolding. The environment then expands abruptly into a wide, garden-filled plaza where a magnificent grand mosque with a blue dome and tall minaret dominates the horizon. Finally, the camera glides from the open plaza into a dense commercial street, weaving through a crowd of pedestrians and market stalls while the illuminated mosque remains visible in the distance.
